titleStmt.title: SII 9.523: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 523. (A.R. No. 323 of 1925.) ON A STONE PLANTED IN A FIELD AT MARABA, KUDLIGI TALUK, SAME DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Śaka 1450, Sarvadhāri, Śrāvaṇa, śu. 15, Śukravāra, corresponding to A.D. 1528 July 31, Friday, in the reign of Kṛishṇarāya. It records that Mallapaṇṇa of Elabarige caused the construction of a shop or stall and made a gift of the same, together with the toll-revenue of the fair held in Malapura, and some land at Moraba to the god (?) Sūryanārāyaṇadēva, for the merit of his mother, Vīramma. Moraba is stated to have been situated in Pāṇḍ[y*]a-nāḍu.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīgaṇādhipatayē namaḥ . nirvighnamastu
namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē . trailōkya
nagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . svasti
śrījayābhyudayaśālivāhanaśaka 1450 neya
sarvadhārisaṁvatsarada śrāvaṇa śudha 15 śu . śrīma
tu Elabarigeya mallapaṁṇanavaru koṭṭa dharmasā
sanada kramaveṁteṁdare . śrīma(ṁ)nmahārājādhirāja
rājaparamēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa vīrakṛṣṇarāyaru pṛthvī
rājyaṁgaiutta namage pallakiya Uṁbaḷige pālisida pāṁḍa
nāḍa vaḷitake saluva morabadali mallapaṁṇavarige puṇya
vāgabēku yeṁdu Avara Aṁma vīraṁmage puṇyalōkavāgali
yeṁdu Aṁṇanavara nirūpadiṁda Akṣaya kaṭṭisida mala
purada Aṁgaḍiya kaṭṭisi saṁtheya vasigeya sarvvamānyava biṭṭu
sūryyanārāyaṇadēvaṁge koṭa dharmaśāsanada kramaveṁteṁda
re . nānū naṁma A(ṁ)mmage vīraṁmage pu(ṁ)ṇyalōka
vāgabēkeṁdu dēvarige dhāreyaneredu koṭa staḷa
dēvenāyakana kere keḷage ¥ 1 morabadali kāḍāraṁbha ¥ 1
Ubhayaṁ Ikuḷa kṣētravanu Anubhavisikoṁḍu dēva
ra sēveyanu māḍikoṁḍu sukhadalli yihudu yeṁ
ṁdu koṭa dharmasāsana ... yidake Āruvo
bbaru Aḷipidaru tama Abhimānara taṁma sa
riya nāyakarige koṭaru .
Digital edition of SII 9.523 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
